candidates.title: Build specialized agent workflows for your business with Amazon Quick and NVIDIA NeMo Agent Toolkit
candidates.summary: In this post, we show how Amazon Quick can serve as the business-user front door for specialized agent workflows. We use the NVIDIA NeMo Agent Toolkit to build a supply-chain risk example that helps a planner move from an Amazon Quick dashboard and knowledge context to a guided mitigation recommendation.

candidates.title: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
candidates.summary: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.

candidates.title: How Couchbase built a multi-model AI architecture for Capella iQ with Amazon Bedrock
candidates.summary: This post describes how Couchbase adopted Amazon Bedrock to power Capella iQ with Anthropic’s Claude family of models, the architectural decisions behind their multi-model approach, and the operational benefits realized in production.

candidates.title: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
candidates.summary: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.

candidates.title: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
candidates.summary: Talk of banning Chinese-made open-weight LLMs reveals the challenge of turning AI into a business.

candidates.title: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC
candidates.summary: David Vélez and Robin Vince join the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC, bringing global leadership in finance, technology, and governance.
